task_snapshots.title: [DECOMPOSE] [RETRY 2] [RETRY 1] 334b — Real-Time Cost Dashboard with Per-Agent Tracking
task_snapshots.description:
A large task needs to be decomposed into 3-5 smaller, atomic subtasks.

## Original large task (id=eb03f5696c69)
**Title:** [RETRY 2] [RETRY 1] 334b — Real-Time Cost Dashboard with Per-Agent Tracking
**Role:** frontend
**Description:**
[retry:2] ## Problem
6+ sources: cost opacity is #2 pain. $7K depleted in a day, 11% credits gone in 3 prompts.

## Design
TUI + web dashboard: live cost ticker per agent, run total with projection, budget bar, per-model breakdown, alerts at 80% budget, historical trends.

## Your job
1. Read the task description carefully
2. Identify 3-5 specific, atomic subtasks (each completable in one agent session, < 30 min)
3. Each subtask should target specific files and have clear completion criteria
4. Create each subtask via the task server:
```bash
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8052/tasks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"title": "...", "description": "... [subtask of eb03f5696c69]", "role": "frontend", "priority": 0, "scope": "small", "complexity": "medium"}'
```
5. After creating all subtasks, exit.

IMPORTANT: Each subtask description MUST include '[subtask of eb03f5696c69]' so it can be tracked back to the original task.
